ThingShape.description: MCP services to help with AI development.
ThingShape.name: VPS.Development.MCP.Management_TS

ServiceDefinition.description: Uploads a base64-encoded zip of ThingWorx entity XML into SystemRepository, extracts it, and imports the entities into the running server.
ServiceDefinition.name: ImportEntityZip

FieldDefinition.description: Base64-encoded bytes of the zip to import.
FieldDefinition.name: zipContent

FieldDefinition.description: Name to give the uploaded file, e.g. VPS.zip.
FieldDefinition.name: fileName

FieldDefinition.description: Subfolder under the SystemRepository root to upload, extract, and import into, e.g. vps.
FieldDefinition.name: folderName

ServiceDefinition.description: Calls a service on any Thing with the given params and returns a structured JSON result. Never throws; failures are reported via the returned success/error fields.
ServiceDefinition.name: ExecuteService

FieldDefinition.description: Name of the Thing to call the service on.
FieldDefinition.name: thingName

FieldDefinition.description: Name of the service to call on that Thing.
FieldDefinition.name: serviceName

FieldDefinition.description: Object of parameter name to value to pass to the target service.
FieldDefinition.name: params

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns application/script log entries from the live server, optionally filtered by time window, level, and search text. Read-only; throws on failure (e.g. an invalid logName).
ServiceDefinition.name: GetLogEntries

FieldDefinition.description: Which log to query: ApplicationLog, CommunicationLog, ConfigurationLog, ScriptLog, or SecurityLog. Defaults to ApplicationLog if omitted.
FieldDefinition.name: logName

FieldDefinition.description: Return entries from this many minutes ago through now. Ignored if startTime/endTime are given.
FieldDefinition.name: sinceMinutes

FieldDefinition.description: Explicit ISO 8601 start of the time window. Takes precedence over sinceMinutes if given.
FieldDefinition.name: startTime

FieldDefinition.description: Explicit ISO 8601 end of the time window. Takes precedence over sinceMinutes if given.
FieldDefinition.name: endTime

FieldDefinition.description: Plain substring to search for in log message content.
FieldDefinition.name: search

FieldDefinition.description: Filter to exactly this level: ERROR, WARN, INFO, or DEBUG (case-insensitive). Omit for no level filtering.
FieldDefinition.name: level

FieldDefinition.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50 if omitted, clamped to a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 200.
FieldDefinition.name: maxRows

ServiceDefinition.description: Exports a project's entities from the live server as a base64-encoded zip (the reverse of ImportEntityZip), with a manifest of what was included. Read-only aside from scratch-file cleanup in SystemRepository; throws on failure.
ServiceDefinition.name: ExportEntities

FieldDefinition.description: Name of the ThingWorx project to export. Required, no default.
FieldDefinition.name: projectName

FieldDefinition.description: Whether to include entities the project depends on but doesn't directly contain. Defaults to true if omitted.
FieldDefinition.name: includeDependents

FieldDefinition.description: Optional ISO 8601 start bound, for incremental exports.
FieldDefinition.name: startDate

FieldDefinition.description: Optional ISO 8601 end bound, for incremental exports.
FieldDefinition.name: endDate

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns the live structural definition of a Thing, ThingTemplate, ThingShape, or DataShape: locally-defined services, properties, events, configuration table schemas, and inheritance chain. Throws on failure.
ServiceDefinition.name: GetEntityDefinition

FieldDefinition.description: Name of the entity to inspect, e.g. VPS.Development.MCP.Manager.
FieldDefinition.name: entityName

FieldDefinition.description: One of: Thing, ThingTemplate, ThingShape, DataShape.
FieldDefinition.name: entityType
